subcategory: kinetic animated navigation with ambient shapes
use_cases: Animated website navigation with kinetic hover effects
Menu systems with morphing ambient shapes on interaction
Modern landing page navigation with GSAP-powered transitions
Interactive header navigation with visual feedback
ai_summary: A kinetic navigation component featuring GSAP-powered animations and ambient abstract shapes that respond to user interaction. The navigation features smooth morphing effects and hover states, ideal for modern websites seeking dynamic visual engagement.
